results.title: Former PN MP Charles Azzopardi recovering in hospital after collapse
results.description: Former Nationalist Party MP Charles Azzopardi is recovering in hospital after being admitted to intensive care following what he described as a collapse late on Sunday night. In a social media post published on Tuesday, Azzopardi said he had been unable to respond to the many messages and calls he received after suffering the medical emergency. "On Sunday night, into the early hours of Monday morning, I collapsed and ended up in ITU," he wrote. "Now, by the grace of God, I have left intensive care and am slowly recovering." Azzopardi thanked those who had contacted him and said that, on doctors' orders, his health would remain his immediate priority. "For now, I need to give absolute priority to my health," he said. In the 2026 general election, the former PN MP was not elected in either District 7 or District 12. He received about 1,000 votes in the seventh district, losing to Rebekah Borg and Adrian Delia. He received 154 first-count votes in the 12th district.

results.title: 3,700-Mile 2023 Porsche 718 Cayman GTS 4.0 6-Speed
results.description: This 2023 Porsche 718 Cayman GTS 4.0 has 3,700 miles and was purchased new by the owner, who took delivery of the car via the Porsche Experience Center Delivery program in Los Angeles, California. It is finished in Agate Grey Metallic over black leather and is powered by a 4.0-liter flat-six linked with a six-speed manual transaxle and a locking differential. Equipment includes the Sport Chrono Package, Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), 20" 718 Sport wheels, heated and ventilated 18-way adaptive Sport Plus seats, a heated steering wheel, Lane Change Assist, a Bose sound system, and Porsche Communication Management. This 982 Cayman is now offered by the seller, a BaT Local Partner , on behalf of the owner with a window sticker, the owner's manual, a clean Carfax report, and a California title.

results.title: ABCs of fish: N.S. program aims to bring seafood industry to classrooms
results.description: The Coast to Classroom program will offer resources in more than 100 courses for grades 7-to-12 students in the public system. The province says the materials will help students learn about coastal resources, marine ecosystems and careers in fisheries and aquaculture.

results.description: A Manitoba wildlife rescue is close to capacity when it comes to baby bunnies; however, the organization says many are being brought in needlessly.
